name: SharpCompress
description: SharpCompress is a compression library for NET Standard 2.0/2.1//NET 4.6 that can unrar, decompress 7zip, decompress xz, zip/unzip, tar/untar lzip/unlzip, bzip2/unbzip2 and gzip/ungzip with forward-only reading and file random access APIs. Write support for zip/tar/bzip2/gzip is implemented.
